mapper.sql: supplierId, modelNo, quantity, quantityAssembly, quantityProduce, updateTime, quantityPrepare, binflag, inventory_class
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.inventory_supplier
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into dbo.inventory_supplier
supplierId,
modelNo,
quantity,
quantityAssembly,
quantityProduce,
updateTime,
quantityPrepare,
binflag,
inventory_class,
#{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{quantityassembly,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{quantityproduce,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{quantityprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{binflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{inventoryClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.inventory_supplier
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantityAssembly = #{record.quantityassembly,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantityProduce = #{record.quantityproduce,jdbcType=INTEGER},
updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
quantityPrepare = #{record.quantityprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER},
binflag = #{record.binflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_class = #{record.inventoryClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.inventory_supplier set supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantityAssembly = #{record.quantityassembly,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantityProduce = #{record.quantityproduce,jdbcType=INTEGER}, updateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, quantityPrepare = #{record.quantityprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER}, binflag = #{record.binflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inventory_class = #{record.inventoryClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.inventory_supplier
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantityAssembly = #{quantityassembly,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantityProduce = #{quantityproduce,jdbcType=INTEGER},
updateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
quantityPrepare = #{quantityprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER},
binflag = #{binflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_class = #{inventoryClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where supplierId = #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and modelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
